message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam sequence {
  ArrowColor #000000
  LifeLineBorderColor #000000
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ParticipantBorderColor #000000
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ActorBorderColor #000000
  ActorBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  BoxBorderColor #000000
  BoxBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
}

actor Program as Program
participant "V4L2" as V4L2
participant "Bridge CX3" as CX3
participant "Camera OV5640" as CAM

== Initialization ==
Program -> V4L2 : 1 OpenDevice(/dev/video0)
V4L2 -> CX3 : 2
CX3 -> CAM : 3
CAM --> CX3 : 4
CX3 --> V4L2 : 5
V4L2 --> Program : 6
Program -> V4L2 : 7 InitDevice()
V4L2 -> CX3 : 8
CX3 -> CAM : 9
CAM --> CX3 : 10
CX3 --> V4L2 : 11
V4L2 --> Program : 12

== Test ==
Program -> V4L2 : 13 SetParameter(valueA)
V4L2 -> CX3 : 14 valueA
CX3 -> CAM : 15 valueA
CAM --> CX3 : 16
CX3 --> V4L2 : 17
V4L2 --> Program : 18

Program -> V4L2 : 19 GetParameter()
V4L2 -> CX3 : 20
CX3 -> CAM : 21
CAM --> CX3 : 22 value
CX3 --> V4L2 : 23 value
V4L2 --> Program : 24 value
note left of Program
value must be equal to ValueA
end note

Program -> V4L2 : 25 StartStream()
V4L2 -> CX3 : 26
CX3 -> CAM : 27
CAM --> CX3 : 28
CX3 --> V4L2 : 29
V4L2 --> Program : 30

Program -> V4L2 : 31 GetParameter()
V4L2 -> CX3 : 32
CX3 -> CAM : 33
CAM --> CX3 : 34 value
CX3 --> V4L2 : 35 value
V4L2 --> Program : 36 value
note left of Program
value must be equal to ValueA
end note

Program -> V4L2 : 37 SetParameter(valueB)
V4L2 -> CX3 : 38 valueB
CX3 -> CAM : 39 valueB
CAM --> CX3 : 40
CX3 --> V4L2 : 41
V4L2 --> Program : 42

Program -> V4L2 : 43 GetParameter()
V4L2 -> CX3 : 44
CX3 -> CAM : 45
CAM --> CX3 : 46 value
CX3 --> V4L2 : 47 value
V4L2 --> Program : 48 value
note left of Program
value must be equal to ValueB
end note

Program -> V4L2 : 49 StopStream()
V4L2 -> CX3 : 50
CX3 -> CAM : 51
CAM --> CX3 : 52
CX3 --> V4L2 : 53
V4L2 --> Program : 54

Program -> V4L2 : 55 GetParameter()
V4L2 -> CX3 : 56
CX3 -> CAM : 57
CAM --> CX3 : 58 value
CX3 --> V4L2 : 59 value
V4L2 --> Program : 60 value
note left of Program
value must be equal to ValueB
end note

== Destruction ==
Program -> V4L2 : 61 CloseDevice()
V4L2 -> CX3 : 62
CX3 -> CAM : 63
CAM --> CX3 : 64
CX3 --> V4L2 : 65
V4L2 --> Program : 66

destroy Program
destroy V4L2
destroy CX3
destroy CAM
@enduml
